issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack', not 'Activated'. The card text says '[When Attacking]', which maps to OnAttack trigger. The Activated trigger with HasRestingDon condition is incorrect.

Effect has a condition 'HasRestingDon' but OnAttack already requires the Character to be attacking (which requires it to be rested). The DON cost is a play cost, not a conditional requirement for the effect. This condition should not exist or the effect structure is wrong.

Two separate effects are listed, but the card describes a single optional effect triggered 'When Attacking'. Should be consolidated into one OnAttack effect. The Activated effect is extraneous and incorrect.
